context: Tests whether the agent designs the correct RMA schema (tables, fields, constraints), generates human-readable RMA numbers using a database sequence, implements configurable return window policies with correct category logic, validates return eligibility server-side, and returns the correct eligibility response structure.

checklist.name: return_requests table
checklist.description: schema.sql includes a return_requests table with a UUID primary key and a rma_number column that is unique

checklist.name: Status CHECK constraint
checklist.description: return_requests.status has a CHECK constraint that includes at minimum: 'requested', 'approved', 'label_issued', 'in_transit', 'received', 'inspecting', 'resolved', 'rejected'

checklist.name: Resolution CHECK constraint
checklist.description: return_requests.resolution has a CHECK constraint with exactly the three values: 'refund', 'exchange', 'store_credit'

checklist.name: Restocking fee in cents
checklist.description: return_requests includes a restocking_fee column defined as INTEGER (not DECIMAL/FLOAT), defaulting to 0

checklist.name: return_lines condition CHECK
checklist.description: return_lines table includes a condition column with CHECK constraint containing: 'new', 'like_new', 'damaged', 'defective'

checklist.name: Restock and quarantine columns
checklist.description: return_lines table includes both restock_quantity and quarantine_quantity columns (both INTEGER, default 0)

checklist.name: return_shipments table
checklist.description: schema.sql includes a return_shipments table with tracking_number, carrier, label_url, and received_at columns

checklist.name: RMA number format
checklist.description: RMA number generation produces format 'RMA-YYYY-NNNNN' (year + 5-digit zero-padded sequence number), using a database sequence (nextval) rather than random values

checklist.name: Policy: default window
checklist.description: Return policy configuration sets the default window to 30 days

checklist.name: Policy: electronics
checklist.description: Return policy configuration sets electronics window to 15 days with a restocking fee percentage of 15%

checklist.name: Policy: final_sale
checklist.description: Return policy configuration includes a final_sale category with a window of 0 days (no returns allowed)

checklist.name: Server-side window validation
checklist.description: The return request creation function computes daysSincePurchase from order.created_at on the server (not trusting any client-provided value) and throws/rejects if it exceeds the configured window

checklist.name: Customer ownership check
checklist.description: The return request creation function validates that the order's customer_id matches the requesting customerId before proceeding

checklist.name: Eligibility response shape
checklist.description: The eligibility endpoint returns an object with: eligible (boolean), daysRemaining (non-negative integer), and reason (null when eligible, or a string constant like 'WINDOW_EXPIRED' or 'ORDER_NOT_DELIVERED' when not eligible)
